manual.hero_desc: Scalping robot developed exclusively for BTCUSD CFD on the M1 timeframe. Trades candle patterns filtered by EMA trend direction, support/resistance zones and ATR volatility. SL/TP always registered at the broker as absolute prices.
manual.download_desc: Download the full manual with all details, formulas, and optimized parameters
manual.overview_desc: A reversal scalper that identifies candle patterns and filters entries by trend direction and price position relative to support and resistance zones. Developed exclusively for BTCUSD CFD on the M1 timeframe.
manual.feature_candles: Candle Patterns: Detects 7 classic patterns — Hammer, Inverted Hammer, Engulfing, Harami, Shooting Star
manual.feature_trend: Trend Filter (EMA): Defines market direction. Price above EMA → buys only
manual.feature_sr: Support & Resistance: Dynamic S/R from last N candles
manual.feature_atr: ATR Filter: Blocks entries when volatility is outside normal range
manual.feature_dynamic_sl: Dynamic SL: SL rises automatically locking growing share of gain
manual.feature_sltp_broker: SL/TP at Broker: Always registered as absolute prices
manual.params_desc: Default values optimized by the backtester. Adjust freely — the defaults are the recommended starting point.
manual.param_desc_volume: BTC amount per trade. For small accounts use 0.01 (minimum). 1 unit = 1 full BTC.
manual.param_desc_sl: Maximum loss per trade in dollars. SL is calculated as absolute price and sent directly to the broker.
manual.param_desc_tp: Profit target per trade in dollars. Easy to reach on BTCUSD M1 which moves 5-50 points per candle.
manual.param_desc_use_sl: Enables Dynamic SL. When active, the SL rises automatically as profit grows.
manual.param_desc_piso: Minimum guaranteed value that the SL always locks. Works as a minimum breakeven.
manual.param_desc_percent: Percentage of current profit added to the floor. Higher % = more aggressive trailing. Range: 1% to 99%.
manual.dynamic_sl_never_drops: The SL never drops — only rises as profit increases.
manual.desc_min_strength: Minimum candle strength — ratio between body and total range.
manual.desc_hammer: Hammer — long lower shadow (≥2× body). Bullish reversal.
manual.desc_inverted: Inverted Hammer — long upper shadow, bullish body. Bullish reversal.
manual.desc_bullish_engulf: Bullish Engulfing — engulfs previous bearish candle.
manual.desc_bullish_harami: Bullish Harami — small bullish inside previous bearish.
manual.desc_shooting: Shooting Star — long upper shadow, small body. Bearish rejection.
manual.desc_bearish_engulf: Bearish Engulfing — engulfs previous bullish candle.
manual.desc_bearish_harami: Bearish Harami — small bearish inside previous bullish.
manual.ema_info_desc: With UseEMA active, the robot only opens buys when price is above the EMA (uptrend) and only opens sells when price is below (downtrend). This avoids entries against the main market movement.
manual.desc_use_ema: Activates the trend filter via EMA. Only trades in the direction confirmed by the moving average.
manual.desc_ema_period: EMA period. 165 periods on M1 ≈ 2h45min of history.
manual.sr_diagram_bull_desc: Price > EMA → Waits for pullback to SUPPORT → Bullish pattern → BUY
manual.sr_diagram_bear_desc: Price < EMA → Waits for rally to RESISTANCE → Bearish pattern → SELL
manual.desc_use_sr: Activates S/R filter. Entries only near S/R zones with EMA.
manual.desc_candles_sr: Number of candles to calculate dynamic S/R. 183 candles on M1 ≈ 3 hours.
manual.desc_proximity: Zone size as % of total S/R range. 50.5% = half the range is valid zone.
manual.desc_use_atr: Activates volatility filter. Blocks entries on abnormal volatility.
manual.desc_atr_period: Fast ATR period. Slow ATR = ATRPeriod × 3 = 24 candles.
manual.desc_atr_max: Fast ATR cannot exceed 1.3× slow ATR. Blocks extreme volatility.
manual.desc_atr_min: Fast ATR cannot be below 0.3× slow ATR. Blocks when market is dead.
manual.protection_warn_desc: When any of the limits below are reached, the robot stops opening new trades until midnight UTC the next day. Open positions continue to be managed normally.
manual.desc_max_trades: Maximum trades per day. At 61 trades, stops and waits for next day.
manual.desc_max_loss: Maximum accumulated daily loss. Protects capital from bad days.
manual.desc_max_consec: Maximum consecutive losses. After 3 losses without a win, stops.
manual.desc_cooldown: Minimum interval between trades. Avoids burst entries at same price level.
manual.desc_close_fail: If SL/TP cannot be applied after 5 attempts, closes position for safety.
manual.desc_show_panel: Displays information panel on the top-right corner of the chart.
manual.desc_show_debug: Shows detailed logs in cTrader console. Disable in production for better performance.
manual.logic_desc: How the bot decides to open, manage and close each position.
manual.logic_step1_desc: Every candle, the bot checks if daily limits have been reached (max loss, trade count, consecutive losses, cooldown). If any limit is active, no new trades are opened.
manual.logic_step2_desc: On the previous closed candle, the bot checks if any active pattern is present. Candle strength must be ≥ MinCandleStrength.
manual.logic_step3_desc: If UseEMA is active: bullish patterns only valid with price above EMA. Bearish patterns only valid below. Without EMA, trades both directions freely.
manual.logic_step4_desc: If UseSR is active: buys only occur when price is in the support zone. Sells only in the resistance zone. Works together with EMA.
manual.logic_step5_desc: Fast ATR is compared to slow ATR. If volatility is too high (>1.3×) or too low (<0.3×), entry is blocked.
manual.logic_step6_desc: Order is opened WITHOUT SL/TP initially (always accepted). Then SL/TP applied as ABSOLUTE PRICES via ModifyPosition with up to 5 attempts.
manual.logic_step7_desc: Every tick: checks SL/TP still present, updates peak profit, applies Dynamic SL if active and profit ≥ configured floor.
manual.logic_step8_desc: Position closes when price touches TP (profit) or SL (loss) registered at broker. Code does not close manually except on SL/TP failure.
manual.panel_desc: The panel appears in the top-right corner of the chart and updates in real time on every tick.
manual.panel_account_desc: Balance, equity and current spread in pips. Watch the spread — above 20p on BTCUSD can hurt small trades.
manual.panel_candle_desc: Pattern detected on the last closed candle. ^ = bullish, v = bearish, - = none.
manual.panel_position_desc: Type, volume, current PnL and peak profit. SL and TP as absolute prices.
manual.panel_status_desc: ✅ FREE = operating normally. 🔒 BLOCKED = temporary limit. ⛔ PAUSED = daily limit reached.
manual.install_step1_desc: In cTrader, go to Automate → New cBot. Name it VacuumBTCUSD.
manual.install_step2_desc: Replace all editor content with the code from VacuumBTCUSD.cs file. Press F6 to compile.
manual.install_step3_desc: Open a BTCUSD M1 chart. Drag the cBot to the chart or double-click in the compiled bots list.
manual.install_step4_desc: In the parameters window, click the gear icon ⚙ and select Import Parameters. Import the optimized JSON file.
manual.install_step5_desc: Always run on a demo account first for at least 1-2 days. Monitor the log with ShowDebug: true to confirm SL/TP are applied correctly.
manual.sltp_confirm_desc: After opening each order, the log should show: SL/TP aplicados (tentativa 1) ✓ | SL=84360.00 TP=84550.00. This confirms protection was registered at the broker.
manual.warning_btc_only_desc: This bot is calibrated exclusively for BTCUSD CFD. The USD→price conversion formula uses this asset's specific characteristics (LotSize=1, PipSize=1.0). Using on other assets will produce incorrect SL/TP values.
manual.recommendation_desc: Start with default parameters on a demo account for 1-2 days. Monitor the log with ShowDebug: true to understand how filters and protections work before going live.
manual.footer_disclaimer: ⚠️ Risk Warning: Trading involves risk of financial loss. This software does not guarantee profits.
